text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Lack of color detected in Trainer's face.<n>
Exhaustion con...firmed...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Beeep... Energy levels diminished. Unit<n>will
self-destruct in three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Apologies. That was a joke. A bit of<n>robot
humor.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My data reserves suggest that humor can<n>
alleviate fatigue... Did that help at all?
